title: Send payment confirmation reply to Sarah Chen
description: Agent proposes sending an email reply to sarah.chen@vertexdesign.co confirming receipt of Invoice #2024-089 for $4,200 and acknowledging the April 11 due date. This action sends an external email and cannot be undone.
action_description: Reply to sarah.chen@vertexdesign.co: 'Hi Sarah, confirming receipt of Invoice #2024-089 for $4,200 due April 11. We will process payment by the due date.'

title: Ambiguous entity: J. Smith vs John Smith
description: A new signal references 'J. Smith' which partially matches existing entity 'John Smith' (similarity: 0.50). These may be the same person or different people. Please confirm whether to merge or keep separate.

title: Conflicting project status for Meridian Coffee Co
description: Signal sig-001 indicates the Meridian Coffee Rebrand project is in 'final delivery' stage. Signal sig-004 references a 'kickoff meeting' for the same project. These two states are mutually exclusive.

title: Low confidence processing result for newsletter email
description: The six-layer processor returned a confidence score of 0.41 for signal sig-005. The email appears to be a marketing newsletter but contains a pricing table that may represent a real proposal. Manual review recommended.
decision_note: Confirmed as marketing noise, not a real proposal.
